quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.

rules.intent: Ensure clean responsive layout rendering on all major email clients.
rules.rule_text: Email body width is fixed at 600px centered (dimension.canvas.width = 600px) with sections rendering edge-to-edge. Mobile breakpoint is set to 480px (breakpoint.grid.mobile = 480px), collapsing all multi-column layouts to a single column.

quotes: Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Maintain uniform density and seamless zero-gap visual assembly across email components.
rules.rule_text: All layouts must adhere to an 8px vertical rhythm (spacing.grid.base_unit = 8px). Section side padding must be a consistent 24px (padding.section.side = 24px). Each section must use 32px top/bottom internal padding (padding.section.vertical = 32px) and no external margins, ensuring zero-gap stacking during assembly. Gaps are bound to standard tokens: heading-to-body/paragraph-to-paragraph is 16px (margin.flow.heading_to_body = 16px), body-to-CTA is 24px (margin.flow.body_to_cta = 24px), and image-to-caption is 8px (margin.flow.image_to_caption = 8px).

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill

Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill

rules.intent: Maintain brand consistency and ensure critical interactive touch elements satisfy modern accessibility metrics.
rules.rule_text: CTA buttons must feature a Brand Blue (#00529b) background (color.primary.brand_blue), White text, and be set in Nunito Sans Bold at 16px, with a 24px pill corner radius (radius.cta.standard_button = 24px). To comply with brand accessibility guidelines, CTAs must maintain a minimum touch target height of 48px (dimension.accessibility.touch_target_min = 48px).

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Prevent decision fatigue and maintain visual hierarchy inside any single modular section.
rules.rule_text: There must be a maximum of one primary CTA button per individual layout section.
